description: Legal document, Qaraite. Written in Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: Sunday, 15 Iyyar 5418 AM, which is 1658 CE. Involves Aharon Rofe Rosh Mishmarah b. Elʿazar ____[?] ha-Ḥazzan and Avraham Qudsī Rosh Mishmarah b. Yaʿaqov Levi Qayyim. They donate 1000 half-silver pieces for the benefit of Jerusalem. The document goes into depth on the functioning of the mysterious institution of 'mishmarot' ('watches') of which these two men are heads. Some of their responsibilities relate to communal burial arrangements (ll. 10-11). Their terms of service are mentioned on a few occasions with the references to 6 and 12 years.
description_he: מסמך משפטי קראי. ביהודית-ערבית. תאריך: א', ט"ו אייר 5418 = 1658 לספירה. אהרן רופא ראש משמרה ב' אלעזר ואברהם קודסי ראש משמרה תורמים 1000 חצאי כסף לטובת ירושלים. מפרט את תפקוד מוסד 'המשמרות' ותחומי אחריותם.
